title: Andrej
description: A mod that adds many features to minecraft such as new items, weapons, armor and more!
body:
[![Create a server with bisecthosting!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87d0e31467e71029b34c95d1ffd0fbca2dca4619_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/FKOuG)


# What's it all about?

Andrej Mod is a mod about being stupid, it has many features such as new blocks, items and much more!
# Items

Many Items exist within Andrej Mod, You like F1? We have a wide selection of F1 racers!
![items within andrej](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a4609873e3f5e797662c05b2bb6b27fbc7d2f1.png)
![F1 drivers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aa4bf4ad790991d43865faeb52edbbcd887f21d.png)

# Blocks

In Andrej Mod we have a scale block that reads your weight, yes we have an entire weight system! we'll get to that shortly. We also have a sound block so you can jam to your favourite tunes. We also have an entire new material, Sapphire! With its wide collection of blocks.
![A structure using the new blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3724780ad9e11f90d7e0aadafe7d77462089ba14.png)

# Armor

Andrej Mod includes a wide variety of armor, such as Kuudra Follower, Maid Armor, Ohio Armor! and much more! You won't ever run out of armor to wear!
![the new armor within andrej](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41ce04175e243319fa76de734f9c93452838e70c.png)
# Weight

Andrej Mod has a weight system if you eat too much Fried Chicken, too much weight and all will go wrong! So be careful when you eat!

# Mobs
Andrej has a wide variety of mobs such as the Gooner, Pex Mob and the rhino
![enter image description here](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1244983544569397329/1245534582904852510/2024-05-29_20.29.36.png?ex=665a6b79&is=665919f9&hm=45ccc40ee366ca355dc8897826a1e321f73510cb5ab5d080a9cb3517ab479881&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=1178&height=663)
